findings.label: '45+ Countries Tracked' hero stat is scraper target — only ~20 countries populated in Destinations modeled data. Acceptable as scope claim; could soften to '45+ Export Markets'.
Monthly Export vs Domestic bars are sparse (only 2 months of data for 2019/20) — modeled-data coverage limitation. Real ABC shipment PDFs (Phase B2) will fill in.
Forecast Accuracy section shows empty state because abc_forecasts table is still empty (workflow mode change to 'all' in F3a starts populating on next scrape cycle).

fixes_applied_tonight: F1 (critical) — Welcome blank-page FadeIn observer bug: 7 sections below hero were invisible for real visitors. Fixed with viewport-check + failsafe reveal.
F2 (medium)   — Welcome 'Crop Years' stat was 9; actual data is 11 crop years (2015/16–2025/26). Bumped counter target.
F4 (medium)   — PersonaBanner had no mapping for admin/maxons_team/sales/seller. Added 5 new personas; tier now takes precedence over role for MAXONS team.
F5 (high)     — /brokers market-signal YoY was comparing latest year vs SUM of all prior years, making every market show -87% / Avoid. Rewrote to compare to the single prior crop year.
F6 (medium)   — /destinations had duplicate crop-year chips ('2016/17' + '2016/2017'). Added normalizeCropYear() utility + applied on Destinations + Variety + Analysis.
F8 (info)     — Forecasts acreage chart seemed blank in screenshot — actually rendered fine (scroll-position artefact, false alarm).
F9 (low)      — CRM contact-type pluralization: '1 logisticss' + '1 brokers' → '1 logistics' + '1 broker'. UNCOUNTABLE list + count-aware singular.
F10 (high)    — /intelligence claimed '3 AI Models Active' + panel said '4 AI Systems Working Together'. Both overstated. Now shows Claude + ElevenLabs as LIVE, GPT + Gemini as ROADMAP.

F11 (high)    — /map had single 'Zyra AI Agent' entry that hid plan + progress. Split into 5 first-class Zyra systems (bubble/full-page/trainer/whatsapp/prescriptions). Trainer loop 15% exposed honestly.
